# Design System Backlog (2026-04-26)

Scope: design-system component governance, token sourcing, inventory accuracy, and shared UI primitives.

- Active design-system backlog is tracked under:
  - `admin-design-system-parity`
  - `outstanding-build-priorities` (DS-relevant items `US-O27`, `US-O22`, etc.)
- Move or split DS-only stories here as module-only artifacts when they are not shared admin constraints.
